commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=bdfe96b705ccca89e84ce41d47e4d526a0fbc23c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves the CI lint job to `ubuntu-latest`, adds checksum-pinned Linux x86_64 lint-tool installs, and splits `Scripts/lint.sh` so app locale checks run on macOS while portable lint runs on Ubuntu.

Reproducibility: yes. The exact-head GitHub Actions lint job on `ubuntu-latest` fails in the changed `lint-portable` path with SwiftFormat rule timeouts and exit code 70.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because exact-head CI still fails and maintainers need to choose whether to make SwiftFormat stable on Ubuntu or keep that required lint path on macOS.

target.title: ci: run lint on Linux runners
target.body:
## Summary

- Run portable lint on `ubuntu-latest` instead of requesting a fifth macOS runner.
- Keep the macOS-only app locale check on test shard 0, preserving the existing gate.
- Pin SHA256 checksums for the Linux x86_64 SwiftFormat and SwiftLint archives.

## Rationale

Each PR now asks for four macOS test runners. Moving portable lint to Ubuntu removes the additional macOS slot request while the aggregate `lint-build-test` job still requires both lint and every macOS shard.

The first Linux attempt exposed the remaining platform dependency: `Scripts/check-app-locales.mjs` uses macOS `plutil`. This head splits that check into an explicit command on macOS shard 0; all shell, site-localization, SwiftFormat, and SwiftLint checks remain in the Linux lint job.

## Validation

- `./Scripts/lint.sh app-locales`: passed against 20 catalogs / 1,059 English keys.
- `./Scripts/lint.sh lint-portable`: passed; SwiftFormat and strict SwiftLint clean across 1,152 files.
- Workflow YAML parse, shell syntax, and `git diff --check`: passed.
- Full fixup autoreview: clean, confidence 0.87.
- The prior failed run confirmed both pinned Linux binaries install and report the expected versions before reaching the macOS-only locale command.

Exact candidate: `255d5884d20b97dfab8b658e17a077af1f665a45`

Pinned Linux x86_64 archives:

- SwiftFormat 0.59.1: `150d9693570cf234ec91d8a03ba7165bd36a78335c5e40ed91e4c013a492eb54`
- SwiftLint 0.63.2: `dd1017cfd20a1457f264590bcb5875a6ee06cd75b9a9d4f77cd43a552499143b`
target.author: yuxin-qiao

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
